title: Get Billing Groups
content:
Use this endpoint to get all Billing Groups in a Business Center. Both Agency and Direct Business Centers are able to perform billing group related operations. > **Note**
Only users with Finance Manager or Finance Analyst permission can manage payments and invoices in a Business Center. You can use [/bc/member/invite/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739939455765505) and [/bc/member/update/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739696704424961) to configure or update access settings for members. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/billing_group/get/| /v1.3/bc/billing_group/get/| |Request parameter name |`recon_object`
`advertiser_type`|`invoice_group_by`
`billing_group_type`| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number
`billing_group_id`: number|`bc_id`: string
`billing_group_id`: string| |New request parameters | / | `status` | |Response parameter name|`recon_object`
`advertiser_type`
` advertiser_list`|`invoice_group_by`
`billing_group_type`
`advertisers`| |Response parameter data type|`advertiser_id`: number
`billing_group_id`: number|` advertiser_id`: string
`billing_group_id`: string| |New response parameters | / | `status` | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/billing_group/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{50%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID | |filtering |object| Filtering conditions| #|status|string|The Billing Group status that you want to filter by. Enum values: `VALID` (valid), `INVALID`(invalid). | #|invoice_group_by |string|How the invoices in the billing groups are handled.
Enum values: `ACCOUNT`: Invoices in this billing groups are combined.
`ADVERTISER`: Invoices in this billing group are handled separately. | #|billed_to_type|string |Billed-to parties shown on invoices.
Enum values: `ACCOUNT`: Invoices are billed to agencies.
`ADVERTISER`: Invoices are billed to advertisers. | #|billing_group_id |string |Billing Group ID| #|billing_group_name|string | Billing group name. | #|billing_group_type |string|The advertising type of all ad accounts in the billing group. This setting cannot be edited.
Enum values: `AUCTION`, `RESERVATION`. | |page| number| Page number. Default value: 1| |page_size| number| Page size, in the range of 1-50. The default value is 10. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --get -H "Access-Token:xxx" \ --data-urlencode "bc_id=BC_ID" \ --data-urlencode "filtering={\"invoice_group_by\": \"INVOICE_GROUP_BY\", \"billed_to_type\": \"BILLED_TO_TYPE\", \"billing_group_id\": \"BILLING_GROUP_ID\", \"billing_group_name\": \"BILLING_GROUP_NAME\", \"billing_group_type\": \"BILLING_GROUP_TYPE\"}" \ --data-urlencode "page=PAGE" \ --data-urlencode "page_size=PAGE_SIZE" \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/billing_group/get/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number | Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string | Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object| Returned data. | #|list|object[]|List of billing groups.| ##|status|string|The Billing Group status. Enum values: `VALID` (valid), `INVALID`(invalid). | ##|billing_group_id|string|Billing group ID| ##|billing_group_name|string|Billing group name| ##|invoice_object_name|string|Invoice object name| ##|is_primary|bool|Whether it is the default billing group of the Business Center. | ##|advertisers|object[]|List of advertiser accounts in this billing group| ###|advertiser_id|string|Advertiser ID | ###|advertiser_name |string |Advertiser name | ##|billing_group_emails|string[]|Emails of the billing group | ##|invoice_group_by|string|How the invoices in the billing groups are handled.
Enum values: `ACCOUNT`: Invoices in this billing groups are combined.
`ADVERTISER`: Invoices in this billing group are handled separately. | ##|billed_to_type|string|Billed-to parties shown on invoices.
Enum values: `ACCOUNT`: Invoices are billed to agencies. `ADVERTISER`: Invoices are billed to advertisers. | ##|billing_group_type|string|The advertising type of all ad accounts in the billing group. This setting cannot be edited. Enum values: `AUCTION`, `RESERVATION`. | #|page_info|object|Pagination information | ##|page|number|Current page number. | ##|page_size|number|Page Size | ##|total_number|number|Total number of results| ##|total_page|number|Total pages of results | |request_id|string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code) ```
